tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall address
    edit "UbuntuComputer"
        set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
    next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall address

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) #     edit "UbuntuComputer"
new entry 'UbuntuComputer' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (UbuntuComputer) #         set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255 .255

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (UbuntuComputer) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall service custom
    edit "DNS-8853"
        set tcp-portrange 8853
        set udp-portrange 8853
    next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall service custom

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (custom) #     edit "DNS-8853"
new entry 'DNS-8853' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS-8853) #         set tcp-portrange 8853

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS-8853) #         set udp-portrange 8853

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS-8853) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (custom) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    edit 0
        set name "Allow-DNS8853-Approved"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "DNS-Approved-Hosts"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-8853"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 0
        set name "Deny-DNS8853-UbuntuComputer"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-8853"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "Block-DNS-Exfil"
        set uuid f33094e6-335d-51f1-148e-82f66f1bec15
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic all
    next
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
edit 3
        set name "Allow-DNS8853-Approved"
        set uuid 0542dc34-335e-51f1-a2e1-32219dbffebd
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "DNS-Approved-Hosts"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-8853"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 4
        set name "Deny-DNS8853-UbuntuComputer"
        set uuid 055143be-335e-51f1-c709-f0e5eb20890b
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-8853"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    move 4 before 3
    move 3 before 2
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     move 4 before 3

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     move 3 before 2

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
